title: Conduct research and present technical reports
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct research and present technical reports demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine research requirements

pcs.text: Define and confirm research purpose, objectives, limits, and timeframe 1.2 Prepare research outline according to research requirements and confirm with key stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and confirm research purpose, objectives, limits, and timeframe 1.2 Prepare research outline according to research requirements and confirm with key stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and confirm research purpose, objectives, limits, and timeframe 1.2 Prepare research outline according to research requirements and confirm with key stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine research requirements

elements.title: Plan research

pcs.text: Develop systematic methodology for information collection 2.2 Identify, access and evaluate sources of research information according to research requirements 2.3 Develop research strategy, including data gathering and analysis methodologies according to research requirements2.4 Identify and obtain resources required to support research activities

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan research

elements.title: Conduct research

pcs.text: Carry out research according to established purpose, process and objectives3.2 Collect and manipulate research data according to research requirements 3.3 Store research data for future reference according to workplace procedures

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct research

elements.title: Analyse research information

pcs.text: Prepare research data for analysis4.2 Analyse data according to workplace procedures4.3 Draw and document conclusions, findings and recommendations from data analysis according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare research data for analysis4.2 Analyse data according to workplace procedures4.3 Draw and document conclusions, findings and recommendations from data analysis according to workplace procedures.
